This [Legionowo County](/wiki/Legionowo_County "Legionowo County") location article is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Niepor%C4%99t&action=edit).

[[ɲɛˈpɔrɛnt]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Polish "Help:IPA/Polish") is a [village](/wiki/Village "Village") in [Legionowo County](/wiki/Legionowo_County "Legionowo County"), [Masovian Voivodeship](/wiki/Masovian_Voivodeship "Masovian Voivodeship") in east-central Poland.[[1]](#cite_note-TERYT-1) It is the seat of the [gmina](/wiki/Gmina "Gmina") (administrative district) called [Gmina Nieporęt](/wiki/Gmina_Niepor%C4%99t "Gmina Nieporęt").

["Główny Urząd Statystyczny"](https://eteryt.stat.gov.pl/eTeryt/rejestr_teryt/udostepnianie_danych/baza_teryt/uzytkownicy_indywidualni/wyszukiwanie/wyszukiwanie.aspx?contrast=default) [Central Statistical Office] (in Polish). To search: Select "Miejscowości (SIMC)" tab, select "fragment (min. 3 znaki)" (*minimum 3 characters*), enter town name in the field below, click "WYSZUKAJ" (*Search*).

**Nieporęt** [[ɲɛˈpɔrɛnt]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Polish "Help:IPA/Polish") is a [village](/wiki/Village "Village") in [Legionowo County](/wiki/Legionowo_County "Legionowo County"), [Masovian Voivodeship](/wiki/Masovian_Voivodeship "Masovian Voivodeship") in east-central Poland.[[1]](#cite_note-TERYT-1) It is the seat of the [gmina](/wiki/Gmina "Gmina") (administrative district) called [Gmina Nieporęt](/wiki/Gmina_Niepor%C4%99t "Gmina Nieporęt").
